name: Integer Clock Divider
description: Divides an input clock by any even integer ≥ 2. Output maintains 50% duty cycle. Useful when a PLL/MMCM is unavailable or overkill for simple frequency division.
author: aazhi-ip-lib contributors
usage_note: DIVISOR must be even for 50% duty cycle. For synthesis, prefer FPGA-native PLL/MMCM primitives for performance-critical clocks. This is suitable for slow auxiliary clocks.
